ddls:
CREATE TABLE "languages" (
  "language_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each language */,
  "language_name" TEXT /* Name of the language */,
  "language_code" TEXT /* Code of the language (e.g., en for English) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("language_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "domains" (
  "domain_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each domain */,
  "domain_name" TEXT /* Name of the domain */,
  "domain_description" TEXT /* Description of the domain */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("domain_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "texts" (
  "text_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each text */,
  "text_data" TEXT /* Text data */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the text (e.g., social media, customer service chat) */,
  "language_id" INTEGER /* ID of the language the text belongs to */,
  "domain_id" INTEGER /* ID of the domain the text belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the text was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the text was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("text_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_texts_language_id FOREIGN KEY ("language_id") REFERENCES languages ("language_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_texts_domain_id FOREIGN KEY ("domain_id") REFERENCES domains ("domain_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sentences" (
  "sentence_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sentence */,
  "text_id" INTEGER /* ID of the text the sentence belongs to */,
  "sentence_data" TEXT /* Sentence data */,
  "sentence_length" INTEGER /* Length of the sentence */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the sentence was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the sentence was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sentence_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sentences_text_id FOREIGN KEY ("text_id") REFERENCES texts ("text_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "triggers" (
  "trigger_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trigger word */,
  "sentence_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sentence the trigger word belongs to */,
  "trigger_word" TEXT /* Trigger word */,
  "trigger_length" INTEGER /* Length of the trigger word */,
  "trigger_frequency" REAL /* Frequency of the trigger word */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the trigger word was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the trigger word was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trigger_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_triggers_sentence_id FOREIGN KEY ("sentence_id") REFERENCES sentences ("sentence_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "targets" (
  "target_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each target word */,
  "sentence_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sentence the target word belongs to */,
  "target_word" TEXT /* Target word */,
  "target_length" INTEGER /* Length of the target word */,
  "target_frequency" REAL /* Frequency of the target word */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the target word was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the target word was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("target_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_targets_sentence_id FOREIGN KEY ("sentence_id") REFERENCES sentences ("sentence_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ji_surp" (
  "ji_surp_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each joint surprise value */,
  "sentence_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sentence the joint surprise value belongs to */,
  "ji_surp_value" REAL /* Joint surprise value */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the joint surprise value was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the joint surprise value was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ji_surp_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ji_surp_sentence_id FOREIGN KEY ("sentence_id") REFERENCES sentences ("sentence_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "j_surp" (
  "j_surp_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each J surprise value */,
  "sentence_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sentence the J surprise value belongs to */,
  "j_surp_value" REAL /* J surprise value */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the J surprise value was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the J surprise value was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("j_surp_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_j_surp_sentence_id FOREIGN KEY ("sentence_id") REFERENCES sentences ("sentence_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pmi" (
  "pmi_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pointwise mutual information value */,
  "sentence_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sentence the pointwise mutual information value belongs to */,
  "pmi_value" REAL /* Pointwise mutual information value */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the pointwise mutual information value was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the pointwise mutual information value was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pmi_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pmi_sentence_id FOREIGN KEY ("sentence_id") REFERENCES sentences ("sentence_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "e_pmi" (
  "e_pmi_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each expected pointwise mutual information value */,
  "sentence_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sentence the expected pointwise mutual information value belongs to */,
  "e_pmi_value" REAL /* Expected pointwise mutual information value */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the expected pointwise mutual information value was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the expected pointwise mutual information value was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("e_pmi_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_e_pmi_sentence_id FOREIGN KEY ("sentence_id") REFERENCES sentences ("sentence_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "e_ppmi" (
  "e_ppmi_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each expected positive pointwise mutual information value */,
  "sentence_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sentence the expected positive pointwise mutual information value belongs to */,
  "e_ppmi_value" REAL /* Expected positive pointwise mutual information value */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the expected positive pointwise mutual information value was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the expected positive pointwise mutual information value was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("e_ppmi_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_e_ppmi_sentence_id FOREIGN KEY ("sentence_id") REFERENCES sentences ("sentence_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "e_npmi" (
  "e_npmi_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each expected negative pointwise mutual information value */,
  "sentence_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sentence the expected negative pointwise mutual information value belongs to */,
  "e_npmi_value" REAL /* Expected negative pointwise mutual information value */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the expected negative pointwise mutual information value was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the expected negative pointwise mutual information value was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("e_npmi_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_e_npmi_sentence_id FOREIGN KEY ("sentence_id") REFERENCES sentences ("sentence_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "e_pmi_i" (
  "e_pmi_i_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each expected pointwise mutual information with inverse value */,
  "sentence_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sentence the expected pointwise mutual information with inverse value belongs to */,
  "e_pmi_i_value" REAL /* Expected pointwise mutual information with inverse value */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the expected pointwise mutual information with inverse value was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the expected pointwise mutual information with inverse value was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("e_pmi_i_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_e_pmi_i_sentence_id FOREIGN KEY ("sentence_id") REFERENCES sentences ("sentence_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "e_ppmi_i" (
  "e_ppmi_i_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each expected positive pointwise mutual information with inverse value */,
  "sentence_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sentence the expected positive pointwise mutual information with inverse value belongs to */,
  "e_ppmi_i_value" REAL /* Expected positive pointwise mutual information with inverse value */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the expected positive pointwise mutual information with inverse value was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the expected positive pointwise mutual information with inverse value was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("e_ppmi_i_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_e_ppmi_i_sentence_id FOREIGN KEY ("sentence_id") REFERENCES sentences ("sentence_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "e_npmi_i" (
  "e_npmi_i_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each expected negative pointwise mutual information with inverse value */,
  "sentence_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sentence the expected negative pointwise mutual information with inverse value belongs to */,
  "e_npmi_i_value" REAL /* Expected negative pointwise mutual information with inverse value */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the expected negative pointwise mutual information with inverse value was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the expected negative pointwise mutual information with inverse value was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("e_npmi_i_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_e_npmi_i_sentence_id FOREIGN KEY ("sentence_id") REFERENCES sentences ("sentence_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "top_j_preds" (
  "top_j_preds_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each top J prediction */,
  "sentence_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sentence the top J prediction belongs to */,
  "top_j_preds_data" TEXT /* Top J prediction data */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the top J prediction was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the top J prediction was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("top_j_preds_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_top_j_preds_sentence_id FOREIGN KEY ("sentence_id") REFERENCES sentences ("sentence_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "top_ji_preds" (
  "top_ji_preds_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each top JI prediction */,
  "sentence_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sentence the top JI prediction belongs to */,
  "top_ji_preds_data" TEXT /* Top JI prediction data */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the top JI prediction was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the top JI prediction was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("top_ji_preds_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_top_ji_preds_sentence_id FOREIGN KEY ("sentence_id") REFERENCES sentences ("sentence_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mask_types" (
  "mask_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mask type */,
  "sentence_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sentence the mask type belongs to */,
  "mask_type" TEXT /* Mask type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the mask type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the mask type was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mask_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mask_types_sentence_id FOREIGN KEY ("sentence_id") REFERENCES sentences ("sentence_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of the model (e.g., neural network, decision tree) */,
  "model_description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the model was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the model was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_versions" (
  "model_version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model version */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model the version belongs to */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the model */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_versions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_deployments" (
  "model_deployment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model deployment */,
  "model_version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model version the deployment belongs to */,
  "deployment_date" TEXT /* Date the model was deployed */,
  "deployment_status" TEXT /* Status of the deployment (e.g., successful, failed) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the deployment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the deployment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_deployment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_deployments_model_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_version_id") REFERENCES model_versions ("model_version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, researcher, developer) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_model_access" (
  "user_model_access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-model access */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the access belongs to */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model the access belongs to */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Level of access (e.g., read-only, read-write) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_model_access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_model_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_model_access_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)
